programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young Indiana Jones
programme.desc: Young Indiana Jones

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Love and Struggle of Two People

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ex-minister from West Germany hires VENOM to help him spread a virus that turns money bills into blank pieces of paper

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin and Pit are on their way back from Dragons Den when they get ambushed by the Sheriff of Nottinghams soldiers Kevin and Pit join forces with Robin Hood to defeat the Sheriff

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: After approaching a convicted fugitive Nick is convinced of her innocence but must prove it before she is put to death

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A model uses a cursed compact to dispose of anyone who stands in the way of her success including her doctor and her lover

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Jonas has been forced into mandatory retirement He cant relax though because Anitas friends are driving him crazy

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Cathy wants a rich and successful life and fast She visits a medium who tells her she will meet a man who will inherit a lot of money and die in a violent way soon after When she meets grossly overweight Charlie who informs her of his rich relatives she promptly marries him As it turns out the medium is always right

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A young gigolo stays with a washed up film director and his lonely abused wife on an isolated island

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A faux blind woman uses a young man obsessed with her to get rid of her husband

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A succession of murders lead Nick and Schanke to suspect the villain is hunting the citys most dangerous criminals for sport

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Eds mother is being used as a plow horse so he begs Wilbur to buy her at auction Carol is dead set against taking in another horse and Roger is dead set against Kay spending any of his money at the auction

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: The aristocratic Colonel Klink fails a routine physical exam and lands a combat assignment at the Russian front! Fearing a hard-line replacement at Stalag 13 the men must do all they can to rescind Klinks marching papers

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans plan to relieve the bombing pressure on London with a trap hinges on Carters ability to remember the name of a town - Leadingham

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Fed up with a lack of respect from The Crew and low on self-esteem Parker puts in for a transfer But complications develop when McHale and The Boys work up a scheme to try to make him change his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy Directive - Which states that all overweight Combat Officers are to be shipped out - Prompts Binghamton to see that McHale puts on an extra 6 pounds - Enough to put him over the limit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A satellite bound for Mars lands on the island The castaways hope to use it to provide visual evidence to the world that they are still alive

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan wins a million-dollar sweepstakes and is invited to the Howells country club After feeling lonely he issues IOUs to the others so they may also attend He quickly misplaces the winning ticket and they all get evicted

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants nothing to do with his wealthy new neighbors

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are dubious when Luke gets a part-time job as a shoe salesman but when he loses the job the rest of the McCoys unknowingly come to his aid by going to the store en masse to buy shoes

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS tries to blackmail the world when they get an atomic bomb

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS threatens the USA to dry up its entire water supply CONTROL is temporarily taken over by its original chief Admiral Hardgrade

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ travels to Florida to visit his war buddy Charlie Broler but a helicopter crash cuts short the friendly reunion BJ and an eager marine patrolwoman set to work unraveling the mystery Musical performances from Sister Sledge and Jim Stafford highlight the episode

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: The Crooked Web
programme.desc: A restaurant owner becomes trapped in a plot to return him to Germany for a murder committed in the war

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.desc: Hong 114

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Hellbound
programme.desc: Two Chicago cops Chuck Norris Calvin Levels investigate a murder until they encounter an ancient demon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: As the gods look on two figures from mythology play out an ancient story But can Alec break the curse before his friends die

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: After destroying an asteroid on a collision course with the moon an even larger obstacle appears - an entire planet! On a recon mission John Koenig encounters an inhabitant who convinces him- on the basis of faith- that the moon and the planet must collide But no one else supports Koenigs stand

programme.title: Killdozer
programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes efforts to reform old-time moonshiner Hard Luck Jones runs into plenty of roadblocks when he hijacks a tank to use as a rolling brewery Bo and Luke have to convince Jones to stop his illegal activities before they wind up in federal prison

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim encounters Humphrey a dwarf who has escaped from the evil Dr Arcane

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A habitually lying little girl falsely accuses Kimble of chasing her through the woods and it puts his life in greater danger

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: While wagon master of a train Cheyenne trades for a Comanche prisoner of the Apaches because he notices the boy is white Cheyenne hopes to convince him to stay with them rather than return to the Comanche but prejudice may stop him

programme.title: Young 120

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Jack Cole was arrested and imprisoned for stealing art treasures of a Latin nation The mission for Phelps and the IM team is to get the objects back But that wont be easy Coles being tortured by the colonel who heads the prison -- and the colonels a traitor who wants the treasure for himself The IMF plans calls for playing the 2 men each deadly off each other

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.desc: American soldiers stranded in the Philippines after the Japanese invasion form guerrilla bands to fight back

programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Roman Bogatov v. Alexey Sotnikov Danila Prikaza v. Maksim Melnik Young Bok Kil v. Viktor Kolesnik Abubakar Mestoev v. Niko Samsonidse Raul Tutarauli v. Maxim Grabovich Alexander Shlemenko v. Paul Bradley

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Zac Chalmers at HK40.

programme.title: HK Best Of's - Best of Submissions Fall 2015 - Episode 1 NEW
programme.desc: HK Best Of's - Best of Submissions Fall 2015 - Episode 1 NEW

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Steven Arens v. Wade Baldwin.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: The Dre Infinite Capri Compton Interview
programme.desc: From different worlds and 2 different culturals Meet the rap star and the opera star who got together an made a few hits

programme.title: The Jaxx Kellerman Interview
programme.desc: Meet this young lady who writes and performs with a real chip on her shoulder Jaxx Kellerman on the Sherard Show

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget must find a highly experimental missile stolen by Doctor Claw and stop him from using it to destroy Metro City

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kil reduces Leader-1 Scooter and Turbo to the size of toys but when the tiny Guardians escape their enemies must shrink themselves to go in pursuit

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades try to take over GoBotron by replacing the Guardian leaders with robotic ringers

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss is capturing all the scientists of a Brain Trust by luring them with a false message from Audric to his radiation surrounded base Jayce stumbles upon the plan and smuggles himself Flora Gillian Oon and the vehicles onto the base

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Professor Hillary is about to decipher ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs that lead to the Golden Scarab with the secret to life itself But a mummy Sly Rax in disguise steals the hieroglyph tablet during the night

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Brand new army planes are disappearing just before they are about to land at McKenna Airfield The owner Dutch McKenna asks his friend Matt Trakker for help

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever
